particulars.description: Freehold property at 22 broad street stamford PE9 1PG any other interest in the property and all rents receivable for the same, goodwill of the chargor's business proceeds of any insurance policy fixtures fittings plant and machinery at the property and all warranties and contracts in connection therewith as well as furniture furnishings equipment tools and all other goods kept at the property not ordinarily disposed of in the ordinary course of business.
